title: feat: AI Cultural Experience Mentor - From Shallow Understanding to Deep Immersion in Modern Cultural Heritage Revolution (Issue #706)
body:
## PR Summary

This PR creates a comprehensive implementation plan for the AI Cultural Experience Mentor project.

## 🎯 Key Features

- Personalized Learning Paths
- AR/VR Immersive Experiences
- Multimodal Cultural Understanding
- Interactive Cultural Heritage
- Community Building

## 🛠️ Technical Implementation

- Frontend: React Native + Three.js
- Backend: GPT-4V, Whisper, Claude
- Infrastructure: Unity3D, WebXR API

## 📊 Market Opportunity

- TAM: `$650B` global cultural market
- SAM: 1.2B cultural learners
- SOM: 200M target users

## 💼 Business Model

- Freemium subscription ($19.99/month)
- Cultural content marketplace
- Institutional licensing

## 🎮 Implementation Roadmap

- Phase 1 (MVP): Months 1-2
- Phase 2 (Enhanced): Months 3-4
- Phase 3 (Ecosystem): Months 5-6

---

**🔥 [PR抢滩] AI Cultural Experience Mentor (Issue #706)**

Generated by 凤雏 (wshten10) using AI-powered rapid prototyping methodology.
